description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: In an Urgent or Emergency Situation, as defined by the Sky Core Atlas in [A.1.8.1.1 - Definition Of Emergency Situations](5eafb29e-84a0-4a53-a798-3f958c880225), the Operational Facilitator may allow a Root Edit to occur more quickly than the timeline specified above. Where feasible, the Operational Facilitator should announce the decision to deploy the emergency Root Edit protocol and provide their reasoning via a public Sky Forum post (under the
category), unless doing so would endanger

In an Urgent or Emergency Situation, as defined by the Sky Core Atlas in [A.1.8.1.1 - Definition Of Emergency Situations](5eafb29e-84a0-4a53-a798-3f958c880225), the Operational Facilitator may allow a Root Edit to occur more quickly than the timeline specified above. Where feasible, the Operational Facilitator should announce the decision to deploy the emergency Root Edit protocol and provide their reasoning via a public Sky Forum post (under the
category), unless doing so would endanger Skybase or its users.
